post_context.title: 3 artifacts that unblock enterprise onboarding in week one
post_context.caption_hook: Enterprise integrations don't fail on APIs. They fail in week one when nobody agrees what "done" means.
themes: Integration truth map: what syncs, what doesn't, who owns breakage.
Decision log: owner, deadline, blocker — updated before standup.
Success metric contract: baseline, day-30 target, sign-off owner.
post_context.cta_question: What's the one doc your team actually reads in week one?
